title: Yammosk Action
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yammosk Action''' was the attempt by the [[Wild Knights]] to capture a [[yammosk]] for study by [[Danni Quee]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. They made attempts at the [[Assault on Arkania]] and [[Operation Safe Passage|Battle of Talfaglio]]. Eventually, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] managed to capture one at the [[Battle of the Black Bantha]] with a [[boarding harpoon]]. It resulted in the development of the [[gravitic amplitude modulator]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
